TranslationContext: This file contains Unit Names for the Abyssal Legions Faction.

Translations.Comment: Legionen = legions. Organized demonic armies, mixed with corrupted mortals. Бездна = the abyss, emphasizing the demonic nature.
Nordmänner = Northmen (barbarians). Axtkrieger = axe warriors. Corrupted northern warriors. Топор = axe, Северяне = Northmen.
Armored warriors corrupted by the abyss. Воины = warriors, heavy and corrupted.
Brut = spawn. Corrupted dragon-like creatures. Отродье = spawn/brood, emphasizing demonic origin.
Reiter = riders/cavalry. Northern barbarian cavalry. Конница = cavalry units.
Corrupted knights serving the abyss. Heavy demonic cavalry. Рыцари = knights, elite warriors.
War hounds from the abyss. Fast attack beasts. Гончие = hunting hounds, fierce and aggressive.
Demonic chariot. Brutal and swift. Колесница = war chariot, used in classical fantasy warfare.
Greater demon. Same as in Abyssal Demons faction. Архидемон = arch-demon, highest ranking demon.
Lesser demons. Same as in Abyssal Demons faction. Дьяволята = imp-like demonic creatures, lesser demons.
Corrupted war mammoth. Massive beast of war. Боевой = war/combat, Мамонт = mammoth.
Dragon corrupted by the abyss. Terrifying flying monster. Дракон = dragon, most powerful flying unit.
Standard German term for manticore. Mythological beast. Мантикора = direct translation of mythological creature.
Elite warrior of the abyss. Mighty hero unit. Чемпион = champion, supreme warrior.
Dark sorcerer wielding abyssal magic. Чародей = sorcerer/wizard, master of dark arts.
Rudelführer = pack leader. Barbarian warlord. Вожак = leader of pack, Стаи = of the pack/horde.
